summary: cleanup.sh follows solid bash practices (set -euo pipefail, quoted vars, validation). Workflow lacks full-length action SHA pinning—uses `actions/checkout@v4` instead of required `v4@<SHA>` format. Run-act-tests.sh modifies workflow YAML at runtime (sed on artifact-cleanup-script.yml lines) creating fragile path coupling. No verification of workflow structure (actionlint, YAML parsing, path existence checks) despite task requirement. Fixture files (basic.tsv, multi.tsv) referenced but not provided—status unclear. Logic is sound; max-total-size correctly tracks only kept artifacts. Good test harness with helper function reducing case duplication. Output assertions rely on exact string matching, appropriate for stated requirements. Gap: workflow structure tests mentioned as required but not implemented.
